name: Open Market Operations
description_short: Data on ECB open market operations including main refinancing operations (MRO), longer-term refinancing operations (LTRO/TLTRO), and asset purchase programmes. Tracks the ECB's liquidity provision to the banking system.
use_cases: How much liquidity has the ECB provided through TLTROs?
What is the current outstanding stock of MRO and LTRO operations?
How have ECB asset purchases under APP and PEPP evolved?
What are the terms and rates of ECB refinancing operations?
